column1: # Source: ITU-T Rec. H.264 (ISO/IEC 14496-10), Section 9.1.1, Table 9-3
#         "Assignment of syntax element to codeNum for signed Exp-Golomb coded syntax elements se(v)".
# The mapping is value(codeNum) = (-1)^(codeNum+1) * ceil(codeNum / 2); the bit string is the
# ue(v) codeword for that codeNum (see h264-table-9-2-ue.tsv).
# Columns (tab-separated): value  bits (MSB-first bit string as written to the stream)
